title: Doctrine Amendment Primitive v1
description: Schema for P38 DoctrineAmendment — governs changes to invariants themselves (K1-K11, D1-D7). Enforces D7 (DOCTRINE_AMENDMENT): no invariant or doctrine amendment may take effect without operator approval and a recorded receipt. Ungated amendments are blocked at the promotion gate. Proposed change -> operator review -> evidence -> receipt -> promotion. This is meta-governance.

amendment_type.description: Type of amendment. 'add' creates a new invariant. 'modify' changes an existing one. 'remove' deletes an invariant. 'supersede' replaces an invariant with a new one.

proposed_text.description: Proposed new text for the invariant (if add/modify/supersede).

affected_primitives.description: List of primitives affected by this amendment.

breaking_change.description: Whether this amendment is a breaking change.

impact_analysis.description: Analysis of the impact of this amendment.

amendment_status.description: Status of the amendment. 'ratified' means the amendment has taken effect.

reviewer_id.description: Identifier of the operator reviewing the amendment.

review.description: Operator review record. Required when amendment_status is 'approved', 'rejected', or 'ratified'.

operator_approval.description: Must be true for any amendment to take effect. Enforces D7 (DOCTRINE_AMENDMENT).

approver_id.description: Identity of the operator approving the amendment.

delegation_ref.description: Optional reference to a delegation token.

authority.description: Authority gate: operator approval required for any invariant change.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting the amendment (incident reports, audit findings, framework requirements).

evidence.description: Evidence gate: proof that the amendment has substantive basis.

receipt_hash.description: Hash-chained proof of the amendment declaration.

receipt.description: Receipt gate: hash-chained proof of amendment.
